stemHtml: What data may be obtained from the Buffet Onset Boundary chart?

options.a: The values of the Mach number at which low speed and Mach buffet occur at different masses and altitudes.
options.b: The values of the Mach number at which low speed and shock stall occur at different masses and altitudes.
options.c: The values of M<sub>MO</sub> and V<sub>MO</sub> at different masses and altitudes.
options.d: The values of M<sub>CRIT</sub> at different masses and altitudes.
